sys_script.name: Add New Request Type to Choice list
sys_script.sys_name: Add New Request Type to Choice list

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_c6212edec3e10310c230fc0d0501318f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>true</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_1852437_person_0_personal_requests</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Add New Request Type to Choice list</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {

    if (gs.nil(current.new_request_type)) {
        return;
    }

    const newChoice = current.new_request_type.toString().trim();

	gs.info('Adding request type: ' + newChoice);

    const choiceGR = new GlideRecord('sys_choice');
    choiceGR.addQuery('name', 'x_1852437_person_0_personal_requests');
    choiceGR.addQuery('element', 'request_type');
    choiceGR.addQuery('value', newChoice);
    choiceGR.query();

    if (!choiceGR.next()) {

        const newChoiceGR = new GlideRecord('sys_choice');
        newChoiceGR.initialize();
        newChoiceGR.name = 'x_1852437_person_0_personal_requests';
        newChoiceGR.element = 'request_type';
        newChoiceGR.label = newChoice;
        newChoiceGR.value = newChoice;
        newChoiceGR.sequence = 100;
        newChoiceGR.language = 'en';
        newChoiceGR.insert();
    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-20 14:17:20</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>c6212edec3e10310c230fc0d0501318f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>5</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Add New Request Type to Choice list</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Personal Requests" source="x_1852437_person_0">7fa9ce1ac3610310c230fc0d0501311e</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Personal Requests">7fa9ce1ac3610310c230fc0d0501311e</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_c6212edec3e10310c230fc0d0501318f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-20 14:33:35</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=c6212edec3e10310c230fc0d0501318f"/></record_update>
sys_update_version.record_name: Add New Request Type to Choice list

sys_metadata_delete.sys_name: Add New Request Type to Choice list
